description_long: This object is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head and a light-colored wooden handle. The head has a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat, squared poll on the opposite end, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The wooden handle is straight with a slightly tapered, ergonomic grip, showing visible wood grain and a rectangular cross-section. The blade is thick and heavy, with a pronounced bevel and a clean, sharp edge, while the poll is flat and solid for striking. The mounting of the head to the handle appears traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the handle. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a dark metal head and a straight, light wooden handle, featuring a wedge-shaped blade and a flat poll for chopping and striking.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from above, highlighting the broad blade and the rectangular wooden handle.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the thickness of the blade, the flat poll, and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the opposite top angle, emphasizing the wedge shape of the blade and the handle's taper.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, showing the curved blade edge and the full length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a rectangular cross-section, visible wood grain, and a slightly tapered ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Wedge-shaped, single-edged blade with a pronounced bevel and a flat poll on the opposite end; no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle.
